hero.title: OMNIVERSE GAMES
hero.subtitle: Gaming With Sense
hero.description: Technology at the service of gaming, blockchain, esports, PVP, AI, and much more…

about.title: Who We Are
about.description: At Omniverse Games we develop next-generation video games and digital experiences. We combine innovation, technology and creativity to build immersive worlds designed to connect millions of players.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Create innovative gaming experiences that inspire, entertain and connect communities through unique digital universes.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Make Omniverse Games a global reference in interactive entertainment, developing franchises and technologies that define the future of gaming.

blockchain.title: Own Blockchain
blockchain.description: Proprietary blockchain infrastructure built in-house. Real digital asset ownership without relying on third parties.

global.title: Global Reach
global.description: Connecting players worldwide through digital universes built for borderless communities.

esport.title: Esport
esport.description: Competition, community and spectacle. We build first-class competitive gaming ecosystems.

future.title: Immersive Universes
future.description: Every project is its own universe: narratives, economies and mechanics designed to pull the player in.

spaceOdyssey.title: Space Odyssey
spaceOdyssey.description: Epic space exploration and combat simulation

mysticWorlds.title: Mystic Worlds
mysticWorlds.description: Fantasy adventure with magical creatures and spells

vr.title: Own Blockchain
vr.description: In-game digital asset economy on our own chain. No Ethereum, no middlemen.

academy.title: Omniverse Academy
academy.description: Training in game development, blockchain, and artificial intelligence, with a direct path into the industry and into our own studio.

gameDev.title: Game Development
gameDev.description: Game design and programming with engines like Unreal Engine 5.

blockchain.title: Blockchain
blockchain.description: Game economies, asset tokenization, and smart contracts.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.description: AI applied to NPCs, content generation, and production tooling.

design.title: Game Design
design.description: Systems design, narrative, and balancing for competitive games.

cta.title: Want to get involved?
cta.description: Enrollment opens later. Let us know you're interested.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.description: Our diverse team of passionate professionals is dedicated to creating extraordinary gaming experiences that inspire and entertain players worldwide.

alex.name: Alex Chen
alex.bio: Visionary leader with 15+ years in gaming industry

sarah.name: Sarah Johnson
sarah.bio: Tech innovator specializing in VR and AI

mike.name: Mike Rodriguez
mike.bio: Creative director with award-winning game portfolio

emma.name: Emma Wilson
emma.bio: Visual artist creating stunning immersive experiences

lisa.name: Lisa Thompson
lisa.bio: Building and nurturing our global gaming community

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We constantly push boundaries and explore new possibilities

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Great things happen when we work together

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We strive for the highest quality in everything we do

impact.title: Impact
impact.description: Creating positive change in the gaming world

investors.title: Building Omniverse
investors.description: We're raising a round to build Omniverse: The Primordial Battlezone and the blockchain economy behind it. We're looking for partners who share that long-term vision.

product.title: Product
product.description: Omniverse: The Primordial Battlezone — a competitive shooter with a game economy backed by our own blockchain.

market.title: Market
market.description: Esports and competitive gaming: growing demand for game economies with real asset ownership.

team.title: Team
team.description: A multidisciplinary team with experience in game development, blockchain, and growth.

cta.title: Interested in investing?
cta.description: All investment conversations are confidential. Let's talk directly.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: Ready to join the future of gaming? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and let's create something amazing together.

form.title: Send us a Message
form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project or idea...
form.successMessage: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
form.errorMessage: Failed to send message. Please try again.

newsletter.title: Download the Launcher (Coming Soon)
newsletter.description: Get the Omniverse Games launcher (coming soon) and be first to play The Primordial Battlezone.

footer.description: Experience the next generation of immersive gaming technology. Join us on a journey through infinite possibilities.

cookie.title: Cookie Preferences
cookie.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. You can choose which types of cookies to allow.

necessary.title: Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: Essential for the website to function properly. Cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: Used to deliver relevant advertisements and track campaign performance.

cookie.footer: You can change your preferences at any time in our privacy settings.

minimal.title: Cookies Required
minimal.description: To provide you with the best experience, we need your consent to use cookies. Our website requires cookies to function properly and deliver personalized content.
minimal.privacy: We respect your privacy and only use cookies to enhance your experience. You can learn more about our cookie policy.
minimal.note: By continuing, you agree to our use of cookies for analytics, functionality, and marketing purposes.
